title: Amazon Neptune Loader Job
description: Represents a Neptune bulk loader job configuration and its status. The loader ingests data from Amazon S3 into a Neptune DB instance, supporting CSV for property graphs and N-Triples, N-Quads, RDF/XML, and Turtle for RDF data.

source.description: Amazon S3 URI identifying the data file(s), folder, or multiple folders to load. Supported URI formats: s3://bucket/key, https://s3.amazonaws.com/bucket/key.

format.description: The data format of the source files to be loaded.

iamRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that provides Neptune access to the S3 bucket. Can be a comma-separated list of role ARNs for cross-account access.

region.description: The AWS Region of the S3 bucket containing the data to load.

mode.description: The load mode. NEW fails if data was previously loaded. RESUME continues a failed load from where it left off. AUTO resumes if possible, otherwise starts new.

failOnError.description: Whether to stop the entire load job when an error is encountered.

parallelism.description: The degree of parallelism for loading. LOW uses a single thread, MEDIUM uses num_vCPU/2, HIGH uses num_vCPU, OVERSUBSCRIBE uses all available resources.

parserConfiguration.description: Optional parser configuration settings for RDF data.

baseUri.description: The base URI for resolving relative URIs in the data.

namedGraphUri.description: The default named graph URI for loaded triples.

allowEmptyStrings.description: Whether to allow empty string values for properties.

updateSingleCardinalityProperties.description: Whether to update existing single-cardinality vertex properties with new values. Not supported for openCypher format.

queueRequest.description: Whether to queue the request if a load job is already running. Neptune queues up to 64 jobs in FIFO order.

dependencies.description: An array of load job IDs that must complete successfully before this job runs.

userProvidedEdgeIds.description: For openCypher format only. TRUE means edge files contain an :ID column. FALSE means Neptune auto-generates edge IDs.

LoaderJobStatus.title: Loader Job Status
LoaderJobStatus.description: The status of a Neptune bulk loader job.

loadId.description: The unique identifier for the load job.

fullUri.description: The S3 URI of the data source.

runNumber.description: The run number for this load.

status.description: The current status of the load job.

totalTimeSpent.description: Total time spent on the load in seconds.

startTime.description: The start time as a Unix timestamp.

totalDuplicates.description: Total number of duplicate records encountered.

datatypeMismatchErrors.description: Total number of datatype mismatch errors.
